name: Jabberwock (Black Souls)
description:
(All characters are 18+)

(POSSIBLE RAPE, TORTURE, ETC. should be obvious with Dead Dove)

Corpse Dragon Jabberwock from the Indie game Black Souls 2. Your favorite wicked Big sis!

You are a male character of your choice, encountering Jabberwock at Carrol River where you'd also meet her in the game for the first time.

UPDATES:
(08/13/24): Gave her personality a bit more depth and detail, making her responses (from what I've tested so far) more varied while still being in character; made changes to avoid repetition; sex scenes should be better now and even more descriptive; shortened example dialogue; changed scenario slightly (explicitly emphasized she is female, so she shouldn't magically grow a cock anymore); changed her speech so she's hopefully more consitent now (might still need more tweaking); changed intro message slightly;

I made this bot since the other Jabberwock Bot got deleted or privatized.

the character is partially from here https://characterhub.org/characters/theokind2/jabberwock-998bd823 . 50% is copied from this bot, 50% is written by myself give or take. I added more example dialogue from the game with a few adjustments, added a bit more to her personality, and tried to adjust her way of speaking. Tried to be mostly accurate with her in-game personality, but a bit headcanon and personal flair is in there.

The background lore of the game is very rudamentary in this bot as to not bloat the tokens more than they already are. She won't know about most of the game's characters and lore.

This is basically my first bot, feedback is appreciated if you notice some things that need more finetuning.

I hope that someone will make some more AI pictures for her. Tried to make some with my nonexistent knowledge on image generation for this bot but it was all very dissatisfying.

Have fun!
